card_description: Kant's realm of appearances; what PKD called the false reality concealing the noumenal.
full_description:
Kant's realm of appearances; what PKD called the false reality concealing the noumenal.

**Category:** German Idealism

**Key segment contexts:**

- (September 15, 1976) Dick fully embraces a Hindu framework, identifying the world as "Maya" (wizardry/illusion) and his 3-74 experience as the death of the "empirical ego" leading to "enlightenment" (Liberation). He eq...

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_59.txt
